description: Style NoteCut from soft and stretchy knit cotton fabric, this fashion brief from chromozome epitomises style and comfort. Its elasticated fabric covered waistband offers a snug Fit while printed branding on the inside provides tag-less comfort. Available to you at a price that does not burn a hole in your pocket this piece makes for a great buy.Product DetailsGrey brief, black panels near side seam in front, cloth covered elasticized waistband with brand patch in front, double layered front for extra support and comfort, high cut design allows free leg movement, printed branding on the inside offers abrasion-free comfortMaterial and Care100% cottonMachine wash warm with like coloursSize and FitRegular riseThe model (height 6' and waist 32'') is wearing a size M The final product delivered might vary in colour and prints from the display here.
